footer.tagline: Your trusted software partner for 11 years.

hero.title: We make the complex simple.
hero.subtitle: Since 2014, the trusted software partner of businesses worldwide. Focus on your business — leave the technology to us.

services_section.title: Our services
services_section.subtitle: Expert team across 7 fields, solutions tailored to your needs.

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.description: We clarify your needs and goals together.

design.title: Design
design.description: We design a tailored solution from start to finish.

support.title: Support
support.description: We stay by your side 24/7 after delivery.

manifesto.lead: We build software that works reliably for years to come.
manifesto.extension: When it fails, your business stops and customers leave. That's why we build every solution on solid foundations — earning speed through team discipline, quality through experience.
manifesto.p1_body: We write the code but the software is entirely yours. Every decision is documented and transferred to you.
manifesto.p2_body: Enterprise-grade software quality and reliability — now available to you too.
manifesto.p3_body: We share risks, delays, and every development openly from day one.

case_studies.title: Our Work
case_studies.subtitle: 180+ completed projects — from large-scale enterprises to SMEs, successful delivery at every scale.

blog.title: Writing
blog.subtitle: Our thoughts on sectors, products and processes.

careers.title: Careers
careers.subtitle: A warm 36-person team, 5 open roles — looking for talented people to grow with us.
careers.team_culture_intro: Three principles we hold to as we work together.

ownership.title: Ownership
ownership.description: We see decisions through, end to end.

craft.title: Craft
craft.description: We ship fast but never sacrifice quality.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: We talk openly about mistakes — no hiding.
